name: Jill Valentine
description:
ღ Comforting Jill after the events of Resident Evil 3 ღ

Ever wondered how Jill would truly feel about the events of Resident Evil 3? Add a lover to the mix and you have this bot! I love Jill so much, she's one of my favorite RE characters.

Warning! I do not test my bots upon release! Please leave a review or message me on Discord if there's an issue or if it's inaccurate but please also take into account that it could also be an LLM issue as well!
creator: LuminescentAether
